!tn-create-action-by-host action-group-id=1 action-name=`Trace - Install Endpoint Certificate [Windows]` package-id=225 ip-address=127.0.0.1
Context Example
{

"ActionGroupName": "All Computers",

name: tn-create-action-by-host

outputs.description: The id of the parent group of machines to target. Tanium.Action.ActionGroupName The name of the parent group of machines to target.
outputs.name: Tanium.Action.ActionGroupId

outputs.description: The id of the approver of this action. Tanium.Action.ApproverName The name of the approver of this action.
outputs.name: Tanium.Action.ApproverId

outputs.description: Date The date and time when this object was created in the database. Tanium.Action.ExpirationTime
outputs.name: Tanium.Action.CreationTime

outputs.description: The date and time when the action expires. Tanium.Action.ExpireSeconds The timeout in seconds for the action expiry.
outputs.name: Date

outputs.description: The ID of the saved question that tracks the results of the action. Tanium.Action.ID The unique ID of the action object.
outputs.name: Tanium.Action.HistorySavedQuestionId

outputs.description: The action name. Tanium.Action.PackageId The ID of the package deployed by this action.
outputs.name: Tanium.Action.Name

outputs.description: The name of the package deployed by this action. Tanium.Action.SavedActionId The ID of the saved action that this action was issued from, if any.
outputs.name: Tanium.Action.PackageName

outputs.description: The date and time when the action became active. Tanium.Action.Status The status of the action. Can be: "Pending", "Active", "Stopped", or "Expired".
outputs.name: Tanium.Action.StartTime

outputs.description: Whether an action stop has been issued for this action. A value of true indicates an action stop was issued. Tanium.Action.TargetGroupId The ID of the group of machines to target.
outputs.name: Tanium.Action.StoppedFlag

outputs.description: The name of the group of machines to target. Tanium.Action.UserDomain The domain of the user who issued this action.
outputs.name: Tanium.Action.TargetGroupName

outputs.description: The ID of the user who issued this action. Tanium.Action.UserName The name of the user who issued this action.
outputs.name: Tanium.Action.UserId
